address: Fox Royd Cottage, Royd Road, Meltham, Holmfirth HD9 4BE
lead_profile_text: Purchased 3-bed cottage specifically for Airbnb/STL. Fox Royd Cottage, Royd Road, Meltham, Holmfirth HD9 4BE. Edge of Peak District National Park. Features: log burner, stables on site (horses welcome — high-demand niche), off-road gated parking with CCTV. Newly refurbished, keys received 23 June 2026. Friend's furniture being delivered at weekend. Mortgage to be paid off ~September 2026. Amanda also runs a construction business and a 6-bed HMO in Reading.
emotional_profile: Commercially experienced and decisive. Multiple income streams — needs fully hands-off management. Calendar blocking for personal use (daughter and friends) is important. Asked for contracts to be sent on the call — strong conversion intent.
green_light_trigger_phrases: Send me through your deal, your contracts
I'll just sort the lock box and everything

top_objections.text: Am I fixing to a contract if I'm not happy with you? Can I get out?
top_objections.zac_response: 6-month fixed term then 3-month rolling notice — industry standard to service existing bookings before exit

top_objections.text: Am I insured on a short-let basis? Currently on landlord-let insurance.
top_objections.zac_response: Will need to switch to STL-appropriate insurance — acknowledged as a step she needs to take before going live

top_objections.text: Mortgage still outstanding — how does that work?
top_objections.zac_response: Zac was relaxed — common situation, paying off in 3-4 months (September 2026)

top_objections.text: What is Stayful's average occupancy rate across the portfolio?
top_objections.zac_response: Net revenue, not occupancy rate, is the real metric. Revenue projections are the more meaningful measure.

top_questions.text: Can I block dates for personal use (daughter, friends)?
top_questions.answer: Yes — calendar blocking via centralised system. Amanda can mark unavailable ranges as needed.

top_questions.text: Is cleaning included or charged to guests?
top_questions.answer: Cleaning is charged to guests — already included in the income figures presented.

top_questions.text: What is Stayful's portfolio-wide occupancy rate?
top_questions.answer: Net revenue is the real metric, not occupancy rate. ~60% occupancy used in projections for this property type/area.

top_questions.text: Do I need to be hands-on?
top_questions.answer: Fully hands-off — Stayful manages everything centrally. Amanda only needs a lock box and Slack access.

what_moved_them: Net revenue focus vs occupancy rate — responded well to the reframing
Slack as the business WhatsApp for the property — immediately understood the concept
Calendar blocking for personal use — specifically mentioned daughter and friends wanting to stay
Stables acknowledged as a genuine USP — Zac agreed it would go in the listing description
Log burner highlighted as a selling point

conversion_gaps.gap: Contract needs to be reviewed and signed before 10 July
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Send contracts immediately; follow-up call in ~1 week as planned

conversion_gaps.gap: Insurance switch from landlord-let to STL-appropriate policy
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Include in follow-up email — she needs to action this before going live

conversion_gaps.gap: Furniture delivery outstanding — small setup items still arriving
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Onboarding inspection can proceed once furniture delivered; photography to follow

offer_framing: 13% + VAT (vs standard 15%), valid if agreement signed before 10 July 2026. Stables as equestrian tourism USP in Peak District — premium niche positioning. Property ready from day one.
zac_close_phrase: Will ring in approximately 1 week to check for questions on the contract and align on furniture/photography/inspection timeline
zac_income_intro: £39,036 gross / £20,296 net / £1,691/month average. Occupancy ~60%, ADR £178. Income not consistent month-to-month — net revenue is the real metric.
zac_reassurance_phrases: Net revenue, not occupancy rate, is the real metric
Mortgage situation is common — paying off in a few months, Zac was relaxed about it
Cleaning is charged to guests — it's already in the figures
zac_analogies: Slack as the business WhatsApp for the property
